src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Initialize the MangoDBConnection field inline to ensure it is not null when used.
Replace hardcoded layout padding value with the standard Swing default size constant.
Update the base URL for the job order status update link to point to the new Render deployment.
Uncomment the main method to allow the application to be launched directly as a standalone Swing application.
Removed @Autowired annotation and constructor parameter for MongoClient to switch to manual instantiation.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.human_impl: Removed '@Autowired' and 'private final MongoClient mongoClient;' field declaration.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Replaced complex constructor logic with configuration object and encryption utilities with a simple no-arg constructor.
Hardcoded MongoDB connection string credentials directly into the source code instead of using configuration variables.
Removed the shutdown hook and close method for MongoClient, relying on local variable scope or GC.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to target Java 21.
Update Maven compiler target property to generate Java 21 bytecode.
Update the project java.version property to 21.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace custom Ubuntu build stage with a pre-configured Maven and OpenJDK 21 image to simplify dependency installation.
Add Maven build command to compile the application within the Docker build stage.
Replace deprecated AdoptOpenJDK runtime image with the official OpenJDK 21 slim image.
Update the copy command to reference the new builder stage name and specific JAR file path.
Switch from CMD to ENTRYPOINT for the Java execution command.
